scripts.build:cf: opennextjs-cloudflare build && (rm -rf .open-next/server-functions/default/node_modules/next/dist/compiled/@vercel/og || true) && npx esbuild .open-next/worker.js --bundle --minify --platform=browser --format=esm --target=es2022 --external:cloudflare:* --external:node:* --external:async_hooks --external:fs --external:path --external:os --external:url --external:vm --external:util --external:buffer --external:events --external:crypto --external:stream --external:http --external:https --external:zlib --external:querystring --external:assert --external:tls --external:tty --external:net --external:child_process --allow-overwrite --outfile=.open-next/worker.js && npx wrangler deploy --minify
